creator: mezz@FreeBSD.org
text:
State Changed
From-To: open->feedback

It looks like your libtool got broke or something. You need to make sure you 
have libtool installation fixed by follow in the /usr/ports/UPDATING or just 
reinstall your libtool and try it again. If you still get same result, please 
follow this: 

http://www.freebsd.org/gnome/docs/bugging.html
